items.title: UK-based One Air introduces scheduled freighter service
items.description: Startup cargo airline One Air continues to expand its fleet, airport hubs and service offerings. The post UK-based One Air introduces scheduled freighter service appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: Boeing Stock Rises. Why This Cautious Analyst Upgraded It to Buy.
items.description: Monday, Vertical Research Partners analyst Rob Stallard upgraded shares of Boeing to Buy from Hold. His price target went to $270 from $242.

items.title: Want to Own a Piece of SpaceX? EchoStar Just Might Be the Best Way In.
items.description: EchoStar  has completely remade its balance sheet and its investment case.  Now, it’s a primary way to invest in Elon Musk’s privately held space-technology company, SpaceX.  Monday, EchoStar announced a deal to sell the company’s AWS-4 and H-block spectrum licenses to SpaceX.

items.title: Alphabet downgraded, Boeing upgraded: Wall Street's top analyst calls
items.description: Alphabet downgraded, Boeing upgraded: Wall Street's top analyst calls

items.title: ARA Awarded Next Generation Penetrator Contract
items.description: Next Generation Penetrator ARA, a defense industry leader, has been awarded a 24-month contract by the Air Force Life Cycle Management Center, Eglin Munitions Directorate, to serve as the System Design Agent for the development of a prototype air-to-ground Next Generation Penetrator weapon system. Albuquerque, NM, Sept. 08, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Applied Research Associates, Inc.
